name: Sage Potash Corp.
description: Sage Potash Corp. is an exploration and development company focused on the sustainable development of its Sage Plain Project in Utah’s Paradox Basin. By utilizing industry-standard solution mining techniques, the company aims to become a premier domestic potash producer in the United States. Dedicated to enhancing agricultural food security, Sage Potash works to reduce U.S. reliance on imported potash, providing a secure and reliable supply for American farmers while mitigating risks associated with global supply chains and geopolitical instability. The company is committed to responsible mining practices to support long-term agricultural prosperity.
